projectDescription: A research framework for robust Text-to-SQL evaluation via query mutation techniques and fine-grained execution metrics.
keyFeatures: Join Query Expansion (JQE): systematically increases SQL structural complexity through semantically valid join additions
Textual Query Augmentation (TQA): generates controlled natural language perturbations to assess robustness to linguistic variation
Fine-grained execution metrics: Execution Precision (EXP), Execution Recall (EXR), and F1 beyond binary Execution Accuracy
Multi-LLM support: OpenAI, HuggingFace, Ollama, Google Gemini, and Together AI backends
Multi-DBMS support: SQLite and DuckDB database adapters
Graph-based schema analysis using NetworkX for join path discovery
Isomorphic query deduplication to ensure diverse evaluation sets
Evaluated on BIRD benchmark databases with CHESS, DIN-SQL, and MAC-SQL systems
publicApiSurface: EvaluationTechnique enum: EXECUTION_ACCURACY, EXACT_COLUMN_AND_EXACT_CELL, EXACT_COLUMN_AND_PARTIAL_CELL, SEMANTIC_COLUMN_AND_EXACT_CELL, SEMANTIC_COLUMN_AND_PARTIAL_CELL, NO_COLUMN_AND_PARTIAL_CELL, UNIFIED_COLUMN_AND_SEMANTIC_ROW
aug_n_table_sql_queries(db_id, num_tables, graph_first, max_queries, max_isomorphic, sort_asc)
process_nl_queries(queries_csv_path, mapping_csv_path, output_csv_path, model_name, seed, temperature)
